title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners
company: Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Delhi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners:
Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners!
